embeds.title: Keystone State Shop
embeds.description:
Support our **KSRP** by purchasing donation gamepasses!
Any support is appreciated

fields.name: Perks for ANY purchase
fields.value:
• GIF Perms
• Priority ticket support
• Ability to post in <#1442225117642883075>

When purchased, open a management ticket in <#1442225117341024311>.

fields.name: Keystone + (100 Robux)
fields.value:
• All Contributor perks
• In-game freecam
• Full Keystone + section

fields.name: Top 3 Contributors Bonus!
fields.value:
If you're in the **top 3** donors (by total Robux spent), you'll receive:
• <@&1461848830856134882>
• Your own **custom role** with a unique name & color
• A **custom emoji** made just for you!

fields.name: All funds go towards:
fields.value: Giveaways, Server upgrades like new uniforms, liveries and prizes for our staff.
